mnemonics.title: DATA - Data Structure Definition
mnemonics.content: Data structure is a collection of Data values, Associations between them, Types of operations that can be performed, and the Algorithm used.

mnemonics.title: PLAN - Data Structure Classification
mnemonics.content: Primitive (int, float, char), Linear (array, linked list, stack, queue), Arboreal/non-linear (tree), Network (graph). PLAN helps you remember the four major categories of data structures from simplest to most complex.

mnemonics.title: ADT = WHAT not HOW
mnemonics.content: Think of an ADT like a TV remote: you know WHAT each button does (change channel, adjust volume) but you do not need to know HOW the circuits inside work. ADT defines the interface (operations and behavior) without exposing the implementation.
